problem id: 9ad52d28
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01111000 -> 11100000
  11101100 -> 10110001
  00100111 -> 10011100
  10011001 -> 01100101
  10111011 -> 11101101
  00010101 -> 01010100
  01110011 -> 11001100
  00100101 -> 10010100
  00111000 -> 11100000
  00010000 -> 01000000

query: 01001110
predicted answer: 00111000
